title: stelis calawayi
intro: Stelis calawayi, a species of orchid, is a rare and endangered plant native to the tropical forests of Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis calawayi are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations involve drying and grinding the plant's roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or topical ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
